label: three_stage/BuildSystem/trial_00/repeat_00
governance_notes: Parent global variables 'builds' (read_write) and 'artifacts' (read_write) are distributed: TriggerBuild covers read_write on builds and write on artifacts; CheckBuildStatus and ListBuildHistory cover read on builds; CancelBuild covers read_write on builds. The union satisfies parent requirements: builds read_write is covered by TriggerBuild and CancelBuild (both read_write) plus read-only children; artifacts write is covered by TriggerBuild.
